Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineConformalFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best conformal affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineConformalFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineConformalFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

Defines the best conformal affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineConformalFromControlPoints(int numPoints, ref IPoint fromPoints, ref IPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints IPoint
toPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

numPoints int
fromPoints WKSPoint
toPoints WKSPoint

DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

DefineReflection(ILine) 

virtual void DefineReflection(ILine l)

Parameters

l ILine

GetControlPointError(int, ref double, ref double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetControlPointError(int i, ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(ref double, ref double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetRMSError(ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

The shift in the Z direction.

virtual void GetZShift(out double zOrigin, out double zOffset)

Parameters

zOrigin double
zOffset double

The rotation angle. Will not be able if different x/y scale factors have been incorporated into the transformation.

bool

other IClone

Returns

bool

IsReflective

Indicates if the transformation contains a reflection (determinant is negative).

virtual bool IsReflective { get; }

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

Move(double, double)

Incorporates a translation factor into the transformation.

virtual void Move(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MoveOrigin

The origin of accumulated transformations used when projecting an affine transformation to a different spatial reference system.

virtual IPoint MoveOrigin { get; set; }

Returns

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection, ref double)

Returns the linear coefficients which define the two dimensional affine transformation.

virtual void QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double params_6_elements)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params_6_elements double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection, ref double[])

Returns the linear coefficients which define the two dimensional affine transformation. The array size of the incoming parameters needs to be 6.

virtual void QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

Reset()

Resets the tranformation.

virtual void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotate(double)

Incorporates a rotation (in radians) into the transformation.

virtual void Rotate(double da)

Parameters

da double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotation

The rotation angle. Will not be able if different x/y scale factors have been incorporated into the transformation.

virtual double Rotation { get; }

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Scale(double, double)

Incorporates scale factors into the transformation.

virtual void Scale(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Direction esriTransformDirection
params_6_elements double

SetLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection, ref double[])

Sets the linear coefficients which define the two dimensional affine transformation. The array size of the incoming parameters needs to be 6.

virtual void SetLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double[]

SpatialReference

The spatial reference in which this transformation is meaningful.

virtual ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

ISpatialReference
